# song

**Instance Property**

The name of the song.

## Declaration

```swift
var song: String?
```

## Identifying the song

- **artist**: The song’s musician.
- **album**: The album that contains the song.
- **artwork**: The URL to an image on disk for the song artwork.

items.description: The album that contains the song.
items.name: album

items.description: The URL to an image on disk for the song artwork.
